---
title: "Git for R Users"
author: "Daulath Khan"
format: html
embed-resources: true
---
```{r}
# Setup to use GIT package

library(usethis)

# Connect RStudio to your Github
create_github_token()
gitcreds::gitcreds_set()

# Put a project into Github
use_github()

#Create a readme
use_readme_md()
```




use_git_config(user.name = "Daulath Khan",
user.email = "Khand@lakeforest.edu")

Adding version control to an actual projectl tracks changes to a finite number of files.
